tool: Bash  pwsh -NoProfile -Command '
Import-Module ./Module/LISSTech.EntitySync.psd1 -Force
try { Connect-EntitySyncVendor -Vendor LCAT -ErrorAction Stop } catch { Write-Output "LCAT: $($_.Exception.Message)" }
try { Connect-EntitySyncVendor -Vendor LTAC -ErrorAction Stop } catch { Write-Output "LTAC: $($_.Exception.Message)" }
$input = "Connect-EntitySyncVendor -Vendor "
[System.Management.Automation.CommandCompletion]::CompleteInput($input, $input.Length, $null).CompletionMatches.CompletionText
'

feat: add LCAT/LTAC vendor alias normalization (T005)

LTAC to LCAT per spec FR-002 so plans always identify the vendor as LCAT.

into the NCentral connection path; full LCAT connection support lands in T021.
EOF
)"
